title: From your idea to the App Store. In 3 steps.
description: No jargon, no surprises. A clear process from first call to publication.

steps.title: Let's talk
steps.description: Describe your idea, your users, your goals. I give you honest feedback and an estimate.

steps.title: I develop
steps.description: Design, development, testing — I build your app keeping you informed at every step. You validate before moving on.

steps.title: We publish
steps.description: I handle store publication. You receive your app ready to use, with 3 months of corrective warranty.
